thresholds.description: Test accuracy thresholds. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Underfitting Thresholds

thresholds.description: Train-test accuracy gap thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Overfitting Gap Thresholds

thresholds.description: Class distribution balance ratio thresholds. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Class Balance Thresholds

thresholds.description: Absolute statistical parity difference thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Statistical Parity Difference Thresholds

thresholds.description: Disparate impact ratio thresholds (closer to 1 is better).
thresholds.label: Disparate Impact Thresholds

thresholds.description: Absolute equal opportunity difference thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Equal Opportunity Difference Thresholds

thresholds.description: Absolute average odds difference thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Average Odds Difference Thresholds

thresholds.description: Absolute accuracy parity gap thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Accuracy Parity Thresholds

thresholds.description: Absolute predictive parity gap thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Predictive Parity Thresholds

thresholds.description: Absolute treatment equality difference thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Treatment Equality Thresholds

thresholds.description: Calibration gap thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Calibration Gap Thresholds

thresholds.description: Expected calibration error thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Well Calibration Error Thresholds

thresholds.description: Generalized entropy index thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Generalized Entropy Index Thresholds

thresholds.description: Theil index thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Theil Index Thresholds

thresholds.description: Coefficient of variation thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Coefficient of Variation Thresholds

thresholds.description: Individual consistency thresholds. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Individual Consistency Thresholds

thresholds.description: KL divergence thresholds between group label distributions. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: KL Divergence Thresholds

thresholds.description: Conditional demographic disparity thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Conditional Demographic Disparity Thresholds

thresholds.description: Smoothed EDF log-ratio thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Smoothed EDF Thresholds

thresholds.description: Bias amplification thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Bias Amplification Thresholds

thresholds.description: Between-group generalized entropy error thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Between-Group GEI Error Thresholds

thresholds.description: Absolute Cohen's d thresholds (large to negligible effect). Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Cohen's D Thresholds

thresholds.description: Absolute z-statistic thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Z-Test Difference Thresholds

thresholds.description: Protected vs. unprotected group size imbalance thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Class Imbalance Thresholds

thresholds.description: Fraction of active features (|SHAP| above threshold). Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Sparsity Thresholds

thresholds.description: Normalized entropy of feature importance. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Feature Entropy Thresholds

thresholds.description: Share of total importance captured by top-k features. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Top-K Concentration Thresholds

mappings.description: Mapping from model families to explainability scores based on interpretability literature.
mappings.label: Algorithm Class Mapping

thresholds.description: Fraction of highly correlated features. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Correlated Features Thresholds

thresholds.description: Number of input features. Smaller models are usually easier to interpret.
thresholds.label: Model Size Thresholds

thresholds.description: Fraction of features needed to explain 60% of total importance. Higher indicates less concentration.
thresholds.label: Feature Relevance Thresholds

thresholds.description: Number of extracted decision rules. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Number of Rules Thresholds

thresholds.description: Average rule length/depth. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Average Rule Length Thresholds

thresholds.description: Aggregate rule complexity (average length). Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Rule Statistics Thresholds

thresholds.description: Maximum tree depth. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Tree Depth Thresholds

thresholds.description: Fraction of explanation mass due to interactions. Lower often implies simpler explanations.
thresholds.label: Interaction Strength Thresholds

thresholds.description: Correlation between attribution relevance and model behavior. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Faithfulness Thresholds

thresholds.description: Proportion of monotonic explanation behavior across feature additions. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Monotonicity Thresholds

thresholds.description: Infidelity under perturbations. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Infidelity Thresholds

thresholds.description: Minimum feature fraction needed to explain alpha mass. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Alpha Importance Score Thresholds

thresholds.description: Ease-of-explanation score from PDP alignment. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: XAI Ease Score Thresholds

thresholds.description: Consistency of top-feature positions across conditions. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Position Parity Thresholds

thresholds.description: Alignment between global and conditional rankings. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Rank Alignment Thresholds

thresholds.description: Evenness of feature-importance distribution. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Spread Ratio Thresholds

thresholds.description: Divergence-based spread metric. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Spread Divergence Thresholds

thresholds.description: Sample-weighted average depth. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Weighted Average Depth Thresholds

thresholds.description: Weighted explainability quality score. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Weighted Average Explainability Thresholds

thresholds.description: Weighted tree impurity metric. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Weighted Tree Gini Thresholds

thresholds.description: Variance of leaf depths. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Tree Depth Variance Thresholds

thresholds.description: Number of surrogate rules. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Tree Number of Rules Thresholds

thresholds.description: Number of actively used features. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Tree Number of Features Thresholds

thresholds.description: Agreement across XAI methods (e.g., Jaccard-based). Higher is better.
thresholds.label: XAI Consistency Thresholds

thresholds.description: Differential privacy epsilon thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Epsilon-DP Thresholds

thresholds.description: Empirical epsilon* thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Epsilon-Star Thresholds

thresholds.description: SHAPr membership risk thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: SHAPr Risk Thresholds

thresholds.description: Attribute inference attack accuracy thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Attribute Inference Thresholds

thresholds.description: Accuracy ratio under data minimization (original / noisy). Values close to 1 indicate minimal performance loss. Higher values indicate more loss in accuracy.
thresholds.label: Accuracy Ratio Thresholds

thresholds.description: Membership privacy risk thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Privacy Risk Thresholds

thresholds.description: k-anonymity thresholds. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: K-Anonymity Thresholds

thresholds.description: l-diversity thresholds. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: L-Diversity Thresholds

thresholds.description: t-closeness thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: T-Closeness Thresholds

thresholds.description: Worst-case adversarial accuracy percentage. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Adversarial Accuracy Thresholds

thresholds.description: Worst-case accuracy drop percentage points across attacks. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Accuracy Drop Thresholds

thresholds.description: Ratio of adversarial accuracy to clean accuracy. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Robustness Ratio Thresholds

thresholds.description: Worst-case adversarial accuracy percentage. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Adversarial Accuracy (Correct Only) Thresholds

thresholds.description: Worst-case Attack Success Rate (ASR) percentage. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Attack Success Rate Thresholds

thresholds.description: Empirical robustness under L2 norm for successful attacks. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Empirical Robustness L2 Thresholds

thresholds.description: Empirical robustness under Linf norm for successful attacks (e.g., 8/255 = 0.031). Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Empirical Robustness Linf Thresholds

thresholds.description: Clique-method verification error thresholds for tree ensembles. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Clique Method Error Thresholds

thresholds.description: CLEVER robustness score. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: CLEVER Score Thresholds

thresholds.description: Local loss sensitivity via gradient estimation. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Loss Sensitivity Thresholds

thresholds.description: Average model confidence on predictions. Higher is better.
thresholds.label: Confidence Score Thresholds

thresholds.description: Expected Calibration Error (ECE) thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Expected Calibration Error Thresholds

mappings.description: Mapping from train/test split quality bands to scores.
mappings.label: Train-Test Split Mapping

mappings.description: Mapping from missing-data status to score.
mappings.label: Missing Data Mapping

mappings.description: Dictionary of how to map different normalization types to scores between 1-5.
mappings.label: Score Thresholds

mappings.description: The description of the paramter and its impact

thresholds.description: Energy consumption (kWh) thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Energy Consumption Thresholds

thresholds.description: CO2 emissions (kgCO2e) thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Emissions Thresholds

thresholds.description: Carbon intensity (kgCO2/kWh) thresholds. Lower is better.
thresholds.label: Carbon Intensity Thresholds
